seoTitle: Pinellas County Schools Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Pinellas County Schools 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 11 first day, May 28 last day, holidays, breaks, hurricane make-up days, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Pinellas County Schools starts the 2025-2026 school year on August 11, 2025 and lists May 28, 2026 as the last day for students with a two-hour early release. Thanksgiving Holidays run November 22-30, Winter Holidays run December 20-January 4, and Spring Holidays run March 14-22. The official calendar marks September 19, October 13, November 24-25, and February 13 as possible hurricane make-up days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Pinellas County start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Pinellas County Schools starts the 2025-2026 school year on Monday, August 11, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Pinellas County Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Holidays run Saturday, March 14 through Sunday, March 22, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Pinellas County in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for students is Thursday, May 28, 2026, with students released two hours early.

calendarFaqs.q: Which Pinellas 2025-2026 dates are possible hurricane make-up days?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar marks September 19, October 13, November 24-25, and February 13 as possible hurricane make-up days.

yearNumbers.label: Last Day Release
yearNumbers.detail: Students are released two hours early on the May 28 last student day.

yearNumbers.label: Potential Hurricane Make-Up Days
yearNumbers.detail: The official calendar marks September 19, October 13, November 24-25, and February 13 as possible make-up dates.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Holidays
yearNumbers.detail: Pinellas spring holidays span two weekends and the intervening school week.

events.description: Students are released two hours early.
